headingStyles.kpi: font-mono text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-light tracking-tighter text-[#F8FAFC]

structure.sidebar: w-64 fixed left-0 top-0 bottom-0 border-r border-[#252B3B] bg-[#10141D] z-50 flex flex-col
structure.main: ml-64 min-h-screen bg-[#0A0D14] flex flex-col relative
structure.commandBar: h-16 border-b border-[#252B3B] bg-[#10141D]/90 backdrop-blur-md sticky top-0 z-40 px-6 flex items-center justify-between shadow-sm

gridPatterns.dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 xl:grid-cols-12 gap-4 lg:gap-6
gridPatterns.riskMatrix: grid grid-cols-3 grid-rows-3 gap-1 bg-[#10141D] p-1 border border-[#252B3B]

card.base: bg-[#161A25] border border-[#252B3B] rounded-none relative overflow-hidden
card.header: px-5 py-4 border-b border-[#252B3B] flex justify-between items-center bg-[#161A25]

button.primary: bg-[#E8590C] text-white hover:bg-[#F76707] transition-colors rounded-none font-sans font-semibold text-sm px-4 py-2 border border-transparent flex items-center justify-center gap-2 cursor-pointer shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(232,89,12,0.2)]
button.secondary: bg-[#1A1F2E] text-[#E2E8F0] hover:bg-[#252B3B] border border-[#334155] transition-colors rounded-none font-sans text-sm px-4 py-2 flex items-center justify-center gap-2 cursor-pointer
button.ghost: bg-transparent text-[#94A3B8] hover:text-[#F8FAFC] hover:bg-[#1C212E] transition-colors rounded-none px-3 py-2 text-sm cursor-pointer
button.danger: bg-red-500/10 text-red-400 border border-red-500/50 hover:bg-red-500/20 transition-colors rounded-none px-4 py-2 text-sm cursor-pointer

badge.healthy: bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-400 border border-emerald-500/30 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-wider
badge.warning: bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-400 border border-amber-500/30 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-wider
badge.critical: bg-red-500/10 text-red-400 border border-red-500/30 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-wider flex items-center gap-1.5 before:content-[''] before:block before:w-1.5 before:h-1.5 before:rounded-full before:bg-red-400 before:animate-pulse
badge.info: bg-blue-500/10 text-blue-400 border border-blue-500/30 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-wider

input.base: bg-[#0D111A] border border-[#334155] text-[#F8FAFC] rounded-none focus:border-[#E8590C] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#E8590C] px-3 py-2 w-full font-mono text-sm placeholder-[#475569] outline-none transition-all

charts.tooltip: bg-[#10141D] border border-[#334155] p-3 text-sm font-mono shadow-xl

background_texture.description: Dark industrial warehouse background, to be used with high opacity dark overlays for auth/login screens or subtle section backgrounds.

factory_interior.description: Industrial setting with stacked metal and heavy machinery, good for equipment placeholder images or header banners.

animations.pulseDot: animate-pulse (for critical status dots and live feed indicators)
animations.slideIn: animate-in slide-in-from-right-4 duration-300 (for alerts and toasts)

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALLATION: Ensure 'lucide-react' is installed for icons. Use stroke-width=1.5 for a sharp, technical look.
GLOBAL STYLES: Add the 'Chivo' (sans) and 'JetBrains Mono' (mono) fonts via Google Fonts in index.html.
LAYOUT ARCHITECTURE: Use the sidebar + command bar structure. The main content area must have the 'blueprint' background utility class applied to establish the industrial theme.
UI COMPONENT RULES: Do NOT use rounded corners on primary cards or buttons. The UI must feel rigid, sharp, and industrial (rounded-none).
TYPOGRAPHY RULES: Use 'font-mono' for all data values, metrics, KPI numbers, timestamps, and sensor readings. Use 'font-sans' for descriptive text, conversational AI responses, and navigation.
DASHBOARD: Build a high-density grid. Use sparklines (via Recharts or similar) inside KPI cards to show trends over time.
EQUIPMENT HEALTH: Implement a split layout. The left pane should show real-time sensor charts (vibration, temp, pressure) using Recharts. The right pane should house the AI Maintenance Wizard.

AI WIZARD: Build a chat interface. User messages align right with a secondary background. AI messages align left with border-l-2 border-[#E8590C]. Include a toggle for model selection (Claude 4.5 vs GPT-5.2).
ROOT CAUSE PANEL: Include evidence chips (small mono badges) that look clickable and link to sensor logs.
RISK MATRIX: Create a 3x3 grid visualization showing Severity vs Urgency, placing anomalies as dots on the matrix.
TESTING: Every button, input, navigation link, card, and interactive element MUST have a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., 'data-testid="nav-dashboard"', 'data-testid="kpi-card-vibration"').
NO MOCKING EXCEPT DATA: The UI interactions (tabs, modals, chat flow) must work. You can mock the initial JSON data for the steel-plant assets, but the UI must be fully functional.
ALERTS FEED: Implement real-time toasts and a dedicated alerts feed panel with severity-based filtering.
COLOR SEMANTICS: Strictly adhere to the provided status colors. Red is ONLY for critical alerts. Orange/Amber is for warnings. Emerald is for healthy states.
